title: Verdict Quality Envelope v1.0
description: cycle-109 Sprint 2 T2.1 (PRD §FR-2.1 + SDD §3.2.1). First-class envelope describing voices succeeded/dropped, chain health, and confidence on every substrate output (cheval / Flatline orchestrator / adversarial-review / BB cheval-delegate / flatline-readiness / red-team-pipeline / post-PR-triage — the 7 consumers in IMP-004). NFR-Rel-1: `status: clean | APPROVED` is definitionally impossible when verdict quality is degraded.

status.description: SKP-001 canonical classification — REQUIRED. Computed exclusively by `compute_verdict_status()` per SDD §3.2.2 contract; consumers MUST read this field rather than re-deriving from sub-fields. Producer-side writers MUST emit; consumer-side readers MUST treat absence as a contract violation (fail-CI in conformance test FR-2.7).

consensus_outcome.description: SKP-002 v5 closure (replaces unrepresentable private `_consensus_impossible`). Set per SDD §3.2.2.1 consensus-outcome algorithm — REQUIRED. When `impossible`, `compute_verdict_status()` returns FAILED per SDD §3.2.2 row 3.

truncation_waiver_applied.description: SKP-001 v6 closure (replaces unrepresentable private `_truncation_waiver_applied`). Set to true only by SDD §4.1.3 break-glass path. Suppresses the `chunks_dropped > 0 → FAILED` promotion when true.

voices_planned.description: Number of voices in this adversarial cohort (e.g., 3 for the canonical Flatline orchestrator triad). Producer-side `validate_invariants` enforces `voices_planned >= 1` per v5 SKP-005 closure.

voices_succeeded.description: Number of voices that produced a usable finding-set. `validate_invariants` enforces `0 <= voices_succeeded <= voices_planned` per v5 SKP-005 closure.

voices_succeeded_ids.description: SKP-003 v6 closure — succeeded voice identities. Enables the SDD §3.2.2 invariant that a voice cannot appear in BOTH voices_succeeded_ids AND voices_dropped[].voice. `validate_invariants` enforces (a) len matches voices_succeeded, (b) entries unique, (c) NO overlap with voices_dropped[].voice.

voice.description: Voice identifier (model alias or role-tag — e.g., `opus`, `gpt-5.5-pro`, `gemini-3.1-pro`).

reason.description: Canonical drop-reason taxonomy. `Other` reserved for edge cases that don't map to the above; consumers route per the reason value.

exit_code.description: POSIX exit code reported by the dropped voice's invocation (per cheval.py::EXIT_CODES taxonomy).

blocker_risk.description: SKP-002 — classifier-assessed likelihood that the dropped voice WOULD HAVE produced a BLOCKER-class finding had it succeeded. Heuristic computed from (a) dropped-voice role weight in adversarial cohort, (b) input-domain risk band (security-touching > docs-only), (c) KF priors for this (voice, sprint_kind). Default `unknown` for cohorts lacking historical priors. Consumed by SDD §3.2.2 classification contract to refuse APPROVED when any dropped voice carries `blocker_risk >= med`. v6 SKP-003 hardening-mode toggle (`.loa.config.yaml::blocker_risk_override.unknown_treated_as_med_until_priors: N`) treats `unknown` as `med` until N priors exist.

chain_walk.description: Within-company fallback chain entries attempted before the voice was finally dropped (e.g., `[opus-4-7, opus-4-6, sonnet-4-6, claude-headless]`). Empty array when no fallback was attempted.

voices_dropped.description: Per-voice failure records. Cross-set invariant with voices_succeeded_ids: a voice cannot appear in both.

chain_health.description: Within-company fallback chain health for this invocation. `ok` = primary succeeded; `degraded` = chain walked to a fallback that succeeded; `exhausted` = every chain entry failed.

confidence_floor.description: Lower-bound confidence for the verdict given the voices_succeeded / voices_dropped state. `high` requires all planned voices succeed AND consensus reached; `med` requires majority succeed; `low` for single-voice or chain-degraded paths.

rationale.description: Human-readable one-paragraph summary of WHY this status was assigned. Renders in PR-comment headers (FR-2.8). MUST NOT carry credentials / endpoint URLs / API keys (NFR-Sec-4); producer-side redaction applies.

single_voice_call.description: FR-2.9 IMP-010: when 1 voice planned (e.g., BB single-pass), suppresses consensus inference. Classifier skips the consensus algorithm and routes per the single voice's outcome directly.

chunked.description: FR-4 chunked-review aggregation occurred (sprint-4 surface). When true, chunks_reviewed + chunks_dropped + chunks_aggregated_findings fields carry the per-chunk telemetry.

chunks_reviewed.description: FR-4: count of chunks the chunking primitive successfully reviewed and aggregated into the final finding-set.

chunks_dropped.description: FR-4: count of chunks that failed mid-review. v5 SKP-001: `chunks_dropped > 0` promotes envelope to FAILED unless `truncation_waiver_applied: true` (set only by SDD §4.1.3 break-glass path).

chunks_aggregated_findings.description: FR-4: total findings emitted across all reviewed chunks (pre-deduplication).
